productDisplayName: Highlander Men Blue Checked Hagen Slim Fit Shirt
description: CompositionBlue plaid check full sleeve shirt made of 100% cotton, has light blue, purple and grey accents, tape detailing on the inseam of the collar, patch pocket on the left chest with embroidered logo, appliqued brand  tab on the placket towards the hem, full length buttoned placket, sleeves with buttoned cuffs and a curved hemlineFittingSlimWash care Machine wash at 40 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron Get ready to take casual dressing to the next level with this  blue plaid check shirt from highlander. The cool cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day while you hang out with your friends. The sleeves can be rolled up for a different look. This shirt can be teamed with low slung jeans and canvas shoes for a laidback look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.11", Shoulders-17.5 "
